= tríceps en polea. Hombros abajo, codos: = cable tricep. Shoulders down, elbows back
= goblet. Mochila abrazada al pecho, baj: = goblet squat. Backpack hugged to chest, controlled descent
= búlgara del gym. Pie atrás en sofá o c: = gym Bulgarian split squat. Rear foot on sofa or bed, glute focus
Tronco erguido, paso mediano. Mochila si: Upright torso, medium stride. Add backpack if easy
Silla firme contra la pared. Sube empuja: Sturdy chair against the wall. Push up with the heel
= hip thrust. Espalda alta apoyada, sube: = hip thrust. Upper back supported, drive up with the glute
2 s de pausa arriba. Mochila sobre la ca: 2 s pause at the top. Backpack over hips if easy
Rango completo, bajada lenta. A 1 pierna: Full range, slow descent. Single leg if easy
Lento y controlado, lumbar pegada al sue: Slow and controlled, lower back pressed to floor
La misma de tu Lower A: The same as your Lower A
= press banca. Si hay banco, mejor en ba: = bench press. Use a bench if there is one
Apoyada en banco o cama firme, espalda n: Supported on bench or firm bed, neutral spine
Bisagra de cadera, espalda neutra SIEMPR: Hip hinge, neutral spine ALWAYS. Conservative travel weight
Sentada con respaldo si hay banco: Seated with back support if there's a bench
Peso ligero, sin balanceo, codos blandos: Light weight, no swinging, soft elbows
Sentadilla con barra en vez de goblet (L: Barbell squat instead of goblet (Lower A): start with empty bar + light load, 4x8.
Peso muerto rumano con barra (Lower B):: Barbell Romanian deadlift (Lower B): 4x8, conservative weight.
Sube a 4 series en compuestos (sem 3–4),: Move to 4 sets on compounds (wk 3–4), then 5x5 on main lifts (wk 5–6).
Reduce reps: 8–10 en compuestos, 10–12 e: Drop the reps: 8–10 on compounds, 10–12 on accessories.
Progresión: +2,5–5 kg en compuestos cada: Progression: +2.5–5 kg on compounds each week if you complete all reps with good technique.
Baja a 3–6 reps en compuestos para fuerz: Drop to 3–6 reps on compounds for pure strength.
Introduce drop sets en el último ejercic: Add drop sets on the last exercise and rest-pause on accessories.
Si todo va bien, peso muerto convenciona: If all is well, conventional deadlift in Lower B with moderate loads.
Semana 11: mismas sesiones, 60% del peso: Week 11: same sessions, 60% of the weight, 2 sets per exercise.
Semana 12: medir peso, fuerza, sensacion: Week 12: measure weight, strength, how you feel and plan the next block.
